todos.title: Pack independent slots into single VLIW bundles in KernelBuilder.build
todos.micro_goal: Implement the scheduled design contract within this scope: Modify KernelBuilder.build to group independent slots into single instruction bundles instead of emitting one bundle per slot.

risk_evidence.quote: Modify KernelBuilder.build to group independent slots into single instruction bundles instead of emitting one bundle per slot.
risk_evidence.explanation: Changing instruction scheduling affects control flow and parallelism execution order, which is a structural change to the program's execution model.

todos.probe_plan: Implement a conservative packing strategy that groups slots only if they belong to different engines and do not have data dependencies. Preserve original single-slot bundles as fallback if packing fails or exceeds limits.

probe_diff_contract.observation: Cycle count reduction due to improved VLIW utilization

invariant_evidence: Dependencies between slots are preserved by checking engine types and data flow.
Scratch space addresses remain unchanged as alloc_scratch is not modified.
todos.edit_scope: Modify KernelBuilder.build to group independent slots into single instruction bundles instead of emitting one bundle per slot.

validator.failure_condition: CYCLES metric >= 147734 or test assertions fail

todos.correctness_rationale: The probe only changes how independent operations are grouped into cycles, not the operations themselves or their order relative to dependencies. Scratch space and data flow remain identical.
todos.fallback_plan: If metric does not improve or tests fail, revert to original single-slot bundling strategy.
todos.rollback_or_shrink_plan: Revert changes to KernelBuilder.build to restore original behavior. If partial success, shrink to only packing slots that are definitely independent (e.g., different engines with no data dependency).
